issue.title: [False Negative]: add 12 phishing domains (go-trust[.]co[.]com, app[.]conigecko[.]live, ...)
issue.body:
> [!IMPORTANT] > ## Executive Summary > > This report documents 12 domain(s) that have been identified as part of active phishing operations. These domains exhibit characteristics consistent with malicious infrastructure and pose an immediate security risk to internet users. The following 12 domain(s) have been analyzed and confirmed as participating in phishing campaign(s): ``` go-trust.co.com app.conigecko.live simpleswapp.com 1lnch.fi-v2.to phanton-wallet.fi-v2.to rabby.fi-v2.to soiflare.fi-v2.to sunswap.nexus fusebox-elavon.org elevon-payment.com suitee-trezorrsuite.com trezorsafety.com ``` ## Threat Analysis ### Phishing Attack Details These domains are part of a phishing campaign targeting cryptocurrency companies and cryptocurrency holders/investors. Attackers may use fake login pages, fake Web3 wallet connection prompts, fake cryptocurrency exchange/swap interfaces, or modified/malicious software to steal cryptocurrency seed phrases/keys. ### Technical Details - Cloaked. This means: if a request does not meet certain internal rules of the attacker, the request may be redirected to a non-existent subdomain "www.www.", a legitimate website, or display various HTTP errors such as 403, 404, 502, etc., SSL certificate errors, infinite loading, or a fake Cloudflare (or other service) CAPTCHA, or show content distinguishable from the phishing page. ### Detections & Targeted Brands - `go-trust.co.com` targets Trust Wallet (trustwallet.com) - VirusTotal: **0 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/go-trust.co.com/detection - Listed on Spamhaus - https://check.spamhaus.org/results/?query=go-trust.co.com - `app.conigecko.live` targets CoinGecko (coingecko.com) - VirusTotal: **2 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/app.conigecko.live/detection - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=app.conigecko.live - `simpleswapp.com` targets SimpleSwap (simpleswap.io) - VirusTotal: **4 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/simpleswapp.com/detection - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=simpleswapp.com - `1lnch.fi-v2.to` targets 1inch (1inch.io) - VirusTotal: **12 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/1lnch.fi-v2.to/detection - `phanton-wallet.fi-v2.to` targets Phantom Wallet (phantom.com) - VirusTotal: **16 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/phanton-wallet.fi-v2.to/detection - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=phanton-wallet.fi-v2.to - `rabby.fi-v2.to` targets Rabby Wallet (rabby.io) - VirusTotal: **10 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/rabby.fi-v2.to/detection - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=rabby.fi-v2.to - `soiflare.fi-v2.to` targets Solflare (solflare.com) - VirusTotal: **11 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/soiflare.fi-v2.to/detection - `sunswap.nexus` targets SunSwap (sun.io) - VirusTotal: **1 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/sunswap.nexus/detection - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=sunswap.nexus - `fusebox-elavon.org` targets Fusebox Elavon (fusebox.elavon.net) - VirusTotal: **2 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/fusebox-elavon.org/detection - Listed on Spamhaus - https://check.spamhaus.org/results/?query=fusebox-elavon.org - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=fusebox-elavon.org - `elevon-payment.com` targets Fusebox Elavon (fusebox.elavon.net) - VirusTotal: **0 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/elevon-payment.com/detection - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=elevon-payment.com - `suitee-trezorrsuite.com` targets Trezor Wallet (trezor.io) - VirusTotal: **14 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/suitee-trezorrsuite.com/detection - Listed on Spamhaus - https://check.spamhaus.org/results/?query=suitee-trezorrsuite.com - `trezorsafety.com` targets Trezor Wallet (trezor.io) - VirusTotal: **18 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/trezorsafety.com/detection - Listed on Spamhaus - https://check.spamhaus.org/results/?query=trezorsafety.com - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=trezorsafety.com ### Diagrams

comment.body: @Alex-302 `doge-blockbook.twnodes.com` в приложении криптокошелька TrustWallet  для это от Binance, так же есть альтернатива для холодного кошелька SafePal (это тоже от Binance) и там для блокчейна Polygon используют бесплатную ноду - `polygon.drpc.org`, зайди на сайт `drpc.org` там ничего нет угрожающего.

issue.title: payorweeathim.com

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

labels.name: A: Waiting for data
labels.description: Waiting for more information from the user

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads)
[https://payorweeathim.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fpayorweeathim.com%2F)

### Comment
> Domain squatters with link tracking, redirects through ads, and finally "invisible" affiliate link redirects.
> Ideally everything using their name servers would be outright blocked, I lack a full list but two to note would be:
> LUNLUN.NS.GIANTPANDA.COM
> YANGYANG.NS.GIANTPANDA.COM
> 

```
Username: @thegreatGreenstar
```


### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/rm8rnjrgkesow8k0o4w0ok4ww4csg8o4d5ehumzhpu.png?nc=1)
</details>


### System configuration

| Information | Value |
|-------------|-------|
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Router
DNS server: | Default
System version: | `MacOs Golden gate`
Browser: | Safari

comment.body:
> I don't see any mentions of "giantpanda" in the DNS records in the responses of these domains. Please let me know how you can block such domains using AdGuard.

Nameservers.
https://radar.cloudflare.com/domains/domain/payorweeathim.com
https://ip.me/whois/payorweeathim.com

 Name Server: LUNLUN.NS.GIANTPANDA.COM
 Name Server: YANGYANG.NS.GIANTPANDA.COM

To my understanding, adguard dns has the capability to block name servers, and due to their subdomain of giantpanda.com nature could block every single name server these types of sites under this specific "provider" use.

They have a lot of name servers, thus why blocking all the subdomains of giant panda for the sake of blocking their name servers is more effective.

Eg via NS record, they also got:
jiajia.ns.giantpanda.com.
po.ns.giantpanda.com.


I know this is a more complex setup, but if Pandas own claims are true about covering over 3 million domains, blocking so many in bulk like this would help a lot.

issue.title: Intercepting phishing sites masquerading as official antivirus software websites.
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

下面的网站都不是官方网站，官方网站是  `https://www.huorong.cn/`

```
huorong-app.com.cn
huorong-c.com.cn
pc-huorongcn.com.cn
down.app-huorong.cn
cm-hongrong.com.cn
an-hongrong.com.cn
```

### Proposed solution

建议加入到你们的数据库中

### Additional information

_No response_

comment.body: 建议下次报告欺诈域名时，*同时附上*向*被伪冒域名持有者*报告的回执（回复），以图片格式。**尤其是**像火绒一类的**安全机构**（他们在bilibili也有[官方帐号](https://space.bilibili.com/315523348)，如果其它联系手段不太方便的话）。

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: T: Social Widget
labels.description: Social widgets, share, like buttons and popups

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check);

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.spotify.com/it/download/windows/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.spotify.com%2Fit%2Fdownload%2Fwindows%2F) ### Comment > Oggetto: I contenuti visivi di Spotify non vengono caricati quando AdGuard per Windows è attivo > > Descrizione: > Sto riscontrando un problema con Spotify quando viene utilizzato insieme ad AdGuard per Windows (versione desktop). Quando la protezione di AdGuard è attiva, Spotify non riesce a caricare alcun contenuto visivo, incluse le anteprime degli album, le anteprime degli artisti e i video correlati (quando disponibili). Solo le tracce audio vengono caricate normalmente. > > Disattivando AdGuard, tutte le anteprime e i video tornano a funzionare immediatamente, quindi il problema sembra essere causato dall’interazione tra Spotify e AdGuard. > > Potreste indagare su questo problema di compatibilità o fornire indicazioni su come risolverlo? ``` Username: @C3LT1C0 ``` ### Screenshots

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://signin.costco.com/e0714dd4-784d-46d6-a278-3e29553483eb/B2C_1A_SSO_WCS_signup_signin_209/oauth2/v2.0/authorize?ClientName=CABC&ui_locales=en-CA&scope=openid+offline_access&response_type=code+id_token&redirect_uri=https://www.costco.ca/OAuthLogonCmd&state=guestUserId=-1002&sp=lws&URL=[SSO]/[SSO]&nonce=2VQSP2REwKVeaImS&client_id=e442e6e6-2602-4a39-937b-8b28b4457ed3&TC=0&response_mode=form_post](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fsignin.costco.com%2Fe0714dd4-784d-46d6-a278-3e29553483eb%2FB2C_1A_SSO_WCS_signup_signin_209%2Foauth2%2Fv2.0%2Fauthorize%3FClientName%3DCABC%26ui_locales%3Den-CA%26scope%3Dopenid%2Boffline_access%26response_type%3Dcode%2Bid_token%26redirect_uri%3Dhttps%3A%2F%2Fwww.costco.ca%2FOAuthLogonCmd%26state%3DguestUserId%3D-1002%26sp%3Dlws%26URL%3D%5BSSO%5D%2F%5BSSO%5D%26nonce%3D2VQSP2REwKVeaImS%26client_id%3De442e6e6-2602-4a39-937b-8b28b4457ed3%26TC%3D0%26response_mode%3Dform_post) ### Comment > There appears to be two problems: > 1) Signing in is not possible as the error "We are having trouble signing you in. Please try again later." is given regardless of whether the login credentials are correct or not > 2) The "Receive a Passcode" and "Sign in with a passkey" buttons are missing > > To resolve 1) I found that adding a custom filter rule = `"@@signin.costco.com^$stealth"` fixes it, but do not have a solution for 2) > > Additional info: > - The sign in page can be reached by visiting https://www.costco.ca/ and then clicking "Sign In / Register" in the top right of the page ``` Username: @SharjeelJ ``` ### Screenshots

issue.title: 1Weather Android: missed ads via pro.cloudx.io on AdGuard DNS

labels.name: A: Won't fix
labels.description: Will not be fixed by the filters devs team

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Missed Ad)
https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.handmark.expressweather

### Comment
1Weather for Android started showing ads while Android Private DNS is set to AdGuard DNS.

Observed on 2026-06-23 after the app update:

- App: 1Weather
- Package: `com.handmark.expressweather`
- Version: `12.7.4` / versionCode `120074`
- Installed from Google Play
- App last update time on device: `2026-06-23 02:15:12` local time
- Device: Fairphone 6, Android 16
- Android Private DNS mode: `hostname`
- Android Private DNS hostname: `dns.adguard-dns.com`

Phone-side DNS resolution check while Private DNS was active:

```text
googleads.g.doubleclick.net          127.0.0.1
pro.cloudx.io                        166.117.229.177
video-muc2-1.xx.fbcdn.net            157.240.223.10
```

The `googleads.g.doubleclick.net` result confirms that AdGuard DNS filtering is active on the phone. Runtime observation showed 1Weather ad requests and a visible banner placement in the app, with ad source values including `CLOUDX` and Facebook-hosted video media.

Please evaluate whether `pro.cloudx.io` should be added to DNS filters for 1Weather Android ads. The `fbcdn.net` media host may be shared Meta CDN infrastructure, so it may need separate/cautious handling.

Older closed issues for this package appear to involve other 1Weather domains (`events.swishapps.ai`, `pro-1w-dataaggregator.onelouder.com`) or incorrect blocking of radar, not this CloudX ad host.

### System configuration

Information | Value
--- | ---
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Android Private DNS / device settings
DNS server: | `dns.adguard-dns.com`
System version: | `Android 16`
Device: | `Fairphone 6`
Blocklists: | Public AdGuard DNS default filtering

Please evaluate whether `pro.cloudx.io` should be added to DNS filters for 1Weather Android ads. The `fbcdn.net` media host may be shared Meta CDN infrastructure, so it may need separate/cautious handling.

Older closed issues for this package appear to involve other 1Weather domains (`events.swishapps.ai`, `pro-1w-dataaggregator.onelouder.com`) or incorrect blocking of radar, not this CloudX ad host.

### System configuration

Information | Value
--- | ---
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Android Private DNS / device settings
DNS server: | `dns.adguard-dns.com`
System version: | `Android 16`

Blocklists: | Public AdGuard DNS default filtering

### Issue URL (Annoyance) [https://caude.ai/login?from=logout](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcaude.ai%2Flogin%3Ffrom%3Dlogout) ### Comment > URL: https://claude.ai/login?from=logout > > Claude is now using a clever tracking metric `?from=logout` > > If a user is found account-switching after burning their usage limits of their previous account, then their newly logged account would have less usage limits applied. > But, the problem is, this even applies for general account switching even if the usage limits are not hit on the first account! issue.body:
### Issue URL (Missed Ad)
https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.handmark.expressweather

### Comment
1Weather for Android started showing ads while Android Private DNS is set to AdGuard DNS.

Observed on 2026-06-23 after the app update:

- App: 1Weather
- Package: `com.handmark.expressweather`
- Version: `12.7.4` / versionCode `120074`
- Installed from Google Play
- App last update time on device: `2026-06-23 02:15:12` local time
- Device: Fairphone 6, Android 16
- Android Private DNS mode: `hostname`
- Android Private DNS hostname: `dns.adguard-dns.com`

Phone-side DNS resolution check while Private DNS was active:

```text
googleads.g.doubleclick.net          127.0.0.1
pro.cloudx.io                        166.117.229.177
video-muc2-1.xx.fbcdn.net            157.240.223.10
```

The `googleads.g.doubleclick.net` result confirms that AdGuard DNS filtering is active on the phone. Runtime observation showed 1Weather ad requests and a visible banner placement in the app, with ad source values including `CLOUDX` and Facebook-hosted video media.

Please evaluate whether `pro.cloudx.io` should be added to DNS filters for 1Weather Android ads. The `fbcdn.net` media host may be shared Meta CDN infrastructure, so it may need separate/cautious handling.

Older closed issues for this package appear to involve other 1Weather domains (`events.swishapps.ai`, `pro-1w-dataaggregator.onelouder.com`) or incorrect blocking of radar, not this CloudX ad host.

### System configuration

Information | Value
--- | ---
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Android Private DNS / device settings
DNS server: | `dns.adguard-dns.com`
System version: | `Android 16`
Device: | `Fairphone 6`
Blocklists: | Public AdGuard DNS default filtering

labels.name: A: Cannot reproduce
labels.description: Filters devs cannot reproduce this issue

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/List-KR/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/List-KR/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/List-KR/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/List-KR/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
>APK flagged as unsafe by my Android due to being made for an older version.

当前中国大陆地区主流厂商暂未适配Android 17。

>Installing it and don't see any non-chinese option to navigate at all.

我同样无法将语言切换为英文。换句话说，我没有看到切换语言的选项，可能是跟随系统设置。

comment.body:
@BlazDT 1. 打开软件，显示开屏画面后进入主页。
图片1
2. 软件提示网络不稳定，点击“网络诊断”。
图片2
3. 等待网络诊断完成。
图片3
4. 诊断结果提示开启了VPN。
图片4
>Please check HTTPS filtering is disabled for this app. 发生问题时，HTTPS过滤是开启的。关闭HTTPS过滤可以解决问题。但请注意：我的会员身份屏蔽了大部分广告。这使得我停用HTTPS过滤后，没有发现广告，但无法肯定广告可以被100%屏蔽（在HTTPS过滤关闭时）。

issue.title: az1.zona.pub

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://az1.zona.pub/?ref=share](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Faz1.zona.pub%2F%3Fref%3Dshare) ### Comment > Здравствуйте, после 1 запуска Zona любой фильм или сериал источник спокойно включается, но стоит выйти из него и ещё включить его или любой другой ИСТОЧНИК появляется предупреждение чтоб выключил блокировки рекламы. Приходится принудительно через настройки закрывать Zona и ещё раз открывать и также тоже самое 1 запуск нормально, потом всё также. На компьютере с Zona и adguard таких проблем вообще нет. Менял DNS, он также баннер показывает чтоб выключил блокировки рекламы, либо вообще ничего не открывает. Исправьте ситуацию 🙏 (на скриншотах как смог всё изложил по полочкам). ### Screenshots

issue.title: bleachmyeyes.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://bleachmyeyes.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fbleachmyeyes.com%2F) ### Comment > • Go to https://bleachmyeyes.com > • Click on a random video (e.g. from ‘Trending Right Now’) > • Play the video > > You should be redirected to an advertisement in the current tab, while the video opens and plays in a new tab.
